paper_title: Organic Geochemistry and Statistical Analysis in the Sava Depression

methods.description: Process for analyzing organic geochemistry of rock samples from exploration wells in the Sava Depression, including determination of total organic carbon content, pyrolysis, and isolation of organic matter for further analyses.

steps.description: Determine the petrographic composition of rock samples, sedimentological features, and biostratigraphic allocation of their geological age.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze petrographic composition and geological age of rock samples

steps.description: Determine organic carbon contents by combustion of acid insoluble matter in a Leco IR-212 carbon analyser after treatment with hot 1:1 diluted 36.5% HCl.
steps.searchable_summary: measure organic carbon content using Leco IR-212

steps.description: Perform pyrolysis on powdered rock samples using Rock-Eval II+TOC and/or Rock-Eval 6 systems.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct pyrolysis on rock samples with Rock-Eval systems
outputs: pyrolysis parameters (TOC, S1, S2, S3, Tmax, HI, OI, PI)

steps.description: Isolate organic matter for optical analyses and sulphur and stable carbon isotope analyses using the conventional HCl/HF/ZnCl2 procedure.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate organic matter for isotope analysis

steps.description: Examine organic matter in transmitted, reflected, and blue fluorescent light using microscopes and measure vitrinite reflectance.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze organic matter under microscope and measure vitrinite reflectance

steps.description: Determine sulphur content of kerogen and bitumen using a Leco SC 132 sulphur analyser.
steps.searchable_summary: measure sulphur content with Leco SC 132

steps.description: Analyze stable carbon isotopes using a Finnigan MAT delta E mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: perform stable carbon isotope analysis with Finnigan MAT delta E

steps.description: Determine extractable organic matter (EOM) by 36-hour Soxhlet extraction with chloroform.
steps.searchable_summary: extract organic matter using Soxhlet extraction

steps.description: Separate extracts by column liquid chromatography into four fractions: saturated hydrocarbons, aromatic hydrocarbons, NSO-compounds, and asphalthenes.
steps.searchable_summary: separate organic extracts using column chromatography

steps.description: Perform gas chromatography analysis of bitumens and their alkane fractions using Perkin Elmer Sigma 300 and Varian 3900 GC.

methods.method_name: Statistical Analysis of Maturity Level Measurements
methods.description: Statistical analysis of vitrinite reflectance measurements to assess maturity levels and their correlation with stratigraphic data.

steps.description: Perform statistical analysis on 23 measurements of vitrinite reflectance from different strata.
Calculate Pearson's linear coefficient and Spearman ranking coefficient for correlation analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Pearson and Spearman correlation coefficients

steps.description: Perform Fisher test (F-test) to compare variances and determine statistical differences between sample populations.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct F-test to compare sample variances
